avalanche.note: ideal mean HD 128; per-bit flip prob ideal 0.5.

differential.note: fixed single-bit input differential; ideal mean 128.

length_extension.note: appending bytes (which changes the length block and re-runs finalization) gives avalanche-level HD; no trivial length-extension relation observed (not a proof).

limitations: collisions measured on truncations only; full 256-bit extrapolated
all searches budgeted; no result is a lower bound

multicollision.note: largest set of messages sharing the same nbit truncation.

output_bias.note: monobit per output bit; |z|>3 count vs 256 bits.

path_merging.note: where a 32-bit wave fingerprint collided, digests still differed -- the accumulator path commitment is doing work.

pebble_property.note: distinct messages gave distinct pre-squeeze coupled states and distinct 256-bit digests across the sample; no full collision.

transcript_injectivity.note: no two distinct messages shared the full accumulator state C_T within budget (transcript space ~ P^256).

truncated_collision.note: truncated digest collision vs birthday law.
